feed.title: Chilepluto
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Welcome
entry.summary: Welcome Hello and welcome to my script docs site. Adding a new network drive with New-PSDrive Required parameters to create a network connection: Parameter Description Name Must be an available drive letter PSProvider Set to FileSystem for network shares and folders Root The network location that you want to map Persist To make it available outside PowerShell (in Explorer) New-PSDrive -Name...
